title: 5pc Strainer Set
features: Sink Strainer 5 Pack, Metal Sink Strainers in Kitchen and Bathroom Plug 7.5cm x4 and small 6.5 cm x1 Diameter for British Kitchen Sink | Drain protector | Hair and Waste Catcher/ Stopper
Help prevent blocked drains and costly plumbing bills with this pack of 5 metal sink strainer
Holes stop food waste getting through, but large enough to allow water to drain quickly from your sink
Designed to fit most sinks - 4 pieces measure at 7.5 cm (3") in diameter and one measures at 6.5cm
Ideal for kitchen, bathroom, floor drain, laundry, wash basin and other drain hole
